description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 24, 2025 at 1:01 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Van Ness Avenue near Pacific Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing south in the left lane on Van Ness Avenue in a queue of traffic for a red light at the intersection with 
Jackson Street. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a passenger car that was initially stopped directly in front of the Waymo AV reversed, 
and the rear of the passenger car made contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
